narrative:
Precinct Racine Village (precinct in Meigs County) has 439 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.3 percentage points.
